name: @com-junkawasaki/svgraph
description: Browser-only SVGraph editor and SVG to PresentationML/PPTX converter.

scripts.check:package: node -e "import('./docs/app.js').then((m) => { for (const name of ['buildSVGraph','buildSVGraphSidecar','svgToDrawingMl','drawingMlToSvg','svgToPptx','initSVGraphEditor','assistantPatchProposal','buildSVGraphAssistantPrompt','parseAssistantPatchProposal','validateAssistantPatch','assistantPatchDiff','applyAssistantPatch']) if (typeof m[name] !== 'function') throw new Error(name); if (!Array.isArray(m.assistantAllowedOps)) throw new Error('assistantAllowedOps'); })" && mkdir -p tmp && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs --version && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svg2dml examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-smoke.xml && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg tmp/package-smoke.xml > tmp/package-smoke.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/group.dml > tmp/package-group.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/freeform.dml > tmp/package-freeform.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg examples/picture.dml > tmp/package-picture.svg && node -e "import('node:fs').then((fs) => { const group = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-group.svg', 'utf8'); if (!group.includes('transform=\"matrix(2 0 0 2 10 20)\"')) throw new Error(group); const freeform = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-freeform.svg', 'utf8'); if (!freeform.includes('<polygon') || !freeform.includes('fill=\"#f97316\"')) throw new Error(freeform); const picture = fs.readFileSync('tmp/package-picture.svg', 'utf8'); if (!picture.includes('<image') || !picture.includes('opacity=\"0.35\"') || !picture.includes('preserveAspectRatio=\"xMidYMid slice\"') || !picture.includes('transform=\"rotate(30 20 25) translate(20 25) scale(-1 1) translate(-20 -25)\"')) throw new Error(picture); })" && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svgraph examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-svgraph.json
